languages.text: "Я достаточно знаю этих тварей, чтобы понимать их язык. В сервиторе нет нужды".
"I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."
languages.original_text: "Я достаточно знаю этих тварей, чтобы понимать их язык. В сервиторе нет нужды".

traits.locale_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."
"I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."
"I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

languages.text: “我很了解这些生物，包括他们的语言。不需要机仆转译。”
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: “我很了解这些生物，包括他们的语言。不需要机仆转译。”

languages.text: «Conozco lo suficiente a estas criaturas para entender su idioma. No necesitaremos el servidor».
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: «Conozco lo suficiente a estas criaturas para entender su idioma. No necesitaremos el servidor».

languages.text: « J'en sais assez sur ces créatures pour comprendre leur langue. Le servitor ne sera pas nécessaire. »
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: « J'en sais assez sur ces créatures pour comprendre leur langue. Le servitor ne sera pas nécessaire. »

languages.text: "Bu yaratıkların dilini anlayacak kadar çok şey biliyorum. Hizmetöre gerek yok."
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yaratıkların dilini anlayacak kadar çok şey biliyorum. Hizmetöre gerek yok."

languages.text: "Ich weiß genug über diese Kreaturen, um ihre Sprache zu verstehen. Der Servitor wird nicht gebraucht."
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß genug über diese Kreaturen, um ihre Sprache zu verstehen. Der Servitor wird nicht gebraucht."

languages.text: 「これらの生き物について十分に知っているので、彼らの言葉を理解できる。従者はいらない」
languages.original_text: "I know enough of these creatures to understand their language. The servitor is not needed."

traits.locale_text: 「これらの生き物について十分に知っているので、彼らの言葉を理解できます。従者はいりません。」
